meta.methodology: Aggregated from campaign data across 74 markets. Benchmarks reflect well-targeted campaigns to verified decision-maker lists unless noted. Ranges represent 10th-90th percentile performance. Data updated annually.
meta.license: Open research data — attribution to b2bdataindex.com required
meta.cite_as: B2B Data Index Cold Email Benchmark Report 2026

united-states.sample_note: Well-targeted campaigns to verified decision-maker lists
united-states.data_quality_note: Highest data density globally. 96% verification achievable with premium sources.

united-kingdom.sample_note: UK PECR compliance required. B2B legitimate interest broadly accepted.
united-kingdom.data_quality_note: ICO-compliant B2B data. PECR applies. Verified lists achieve 95% accuracy.

germany.sample_note: Strict GDPR enforcement. Highly personalised, in-language copy required.
germany.data_quality_note: German B2B data requires legitimate interest basis. Double opt-in common.

france.sample_note: CNIL oversight. French-language copy significantly outperforms English.

india.sample_note: High volume market. English widely used in B2B. Tech sector outperforms.
india.data_quality_note: Large market with variable quality. Verified enterprise lists achieve 91% accuracy.

canada.sample_note: CASL requires express consent or implied consent. Business relationships establish implied consent.

australia.sample_note: Spam Act 2003 governs. Legitimate business contact exempt from prior consent.
australia.data_quality_note: Strong data hygiene culture. 94% verification rates on enterprise lists.

japan.sample_note: Cold email rare in Japanese business culture. Warm introduction or referral required. Japanese-language essential.
japan.data_quality_note: Japanese B2B data requires extreme accuracy. 93% verification achievable for enterprise lists.

singapore.sample_note: PDPA compliant. English dominant in B2B. APAC hub with high decision-maker density.

uae.sample_note: Working week Mon-Thu. English widely accepted. Relationship context valuable.
uae.data_quality_note: DIFC and ADGM zones follow GDPR-aligned frameworks. 94% verification achievable.

netherlands.sample_note: Dutch B2B market receptive to direct communication. AP authority enforces GDPR strictly.
netherlands.data_quality_note: High data quality standards. 94% verification achievable.

sweden.sample_note: Swedes respond well to value-driven, concise messaging. Imse (Swedish DPA) is active.
sweden.data_quality_note: Strong data hygiene. 95% verification on curated enterprise lists.

israel.sample_note: Israeli working week is Sun-Thu. High tech density. English widely used.
israel.data_quality_note: Strong tech sector concentration. 94% verification achievable.

south-korea.sample_note: Korean-language copy essential. Hierarchy-sensitive messaging. PIPA strictly enforced.
south-korea.data_quality_note: Corporate lists achieve 93% verification. Consumer cross-contamination risk.

brazil.sample_note: LGPD in effect. Portuguese required for best results. Sao Paulo concentration.
brazil.data_quality_note: Variable quality market. 90% verification achievable for Sao Paulo/Rio enterprise.

mexico.sample_note: LFPDPPP applies. Spanish-language copy strongly preferred. CDMX and Monterrey concentration.
mexico.data_quality_note: Moderate data quality. 89% verification on CDMX business lists.

switzerland.sample_note: Four language zones. German dominant in B2B. Finance sector very high value.
switzerland.data_quality_note: Swiss Federal Act on Data Protection. 95% verification achievable.

saudi-arabia.sample_note: Vision 2030 driving B2B growth. Arabic preferred, English accepted in tech sectors.
saudi-arabia.data_quality_note: PDPL enforcement emerging. 91% verification on Riyadh and Jeddah enterprise lists.

south-africa.sample_note: POPIA in effect since 2021. English dominant in formal B2B. Johannesburg concentration.
south-africa.data_quality_note: POPIA-compliant sourcing required. 90% verification on Johannesburg enterprise lists.

nigeria.sample_note: NDPR applies but enforcement for B2B cold email is minimal. Lagos concentration.
nigeria.data_quality_note: Emerging data market. 86% verification on Lagos enterprise lists. Bounce rates higher.

turkey.sample_note: KVKK enforced. Turkish-language copy significantly outperforms. Istanbul concentration.
turkey.data_quality_note: Moderate data quality. 89% verification on Istanbul enterprise lists.

poland.sample_note: GDPR enforced. Rapidly growing tech sector. Warsaw concentration. Polish preferred.
poland.data_quality_note: 92% verification achievable on Warsaw enterprise lists.

ireland.sample_note: DPC (Irish DPA) is the lead EU supervisory authority. Tech company HQ concentration.

hong-kong.sample_note: PDPO applies. English widely used. Financial services and trade hub.
hong-kong.data_quality_note: Strong data hygiene. 94% verification on enterprise lists.

china.sample_note: PIPL strictly enforced. Cold email uncommon — WeChat dominant. Chinese-language mandatory. Warm introductions essential.
china.data_quality_note: PIPL compliance complex. 88% verification achievable on enterprise lists.

new-zealand.sample_note: Spam Act compliant. Relationship-driven market. Auckland concentration.
new-zealand.data_quality_note: 93% verification achievable. Small but high-quality data market.

denmark.sample_note: Datatilsynet (Danish DPA) actively enforces GDPR. Danish-language copy preferred.
denmark.data_quality_note: 94% verification achievable on Copenhagen enterprise lists.

norway.sample_note: Datatilsynet enforces. High oil and maritime sector value. Oslo concentration.
norway.data_quality_note: 94% verification achievable on Oslo enterprise lists.

finland.sample_note: Finnish business culture highly analytical. Data-led messaging performs well.
finland.data_quality_note: 94% verification achievable. Strong tech sector concentration in Helsinki.

malaysia.sample_note: PDPA 2010 applies. English widely used in B2B. Kuala Lumpur concentration.
malaysia.data_quality_note: 90% verification achievable on enterprise lists. PDPA compliance recommended.

philippines.sample_note: Data Privacy Act 2012. English dominant in business. BPO and tech sector strong.

indonesia.sample_note: PDP Law 2022 — implementation period ongoing. English accepted in corporate B2B.
indonesia.data_quality_note: 87% verification achievable. Jakarta concentration. Growing enterprise data market.

thailand.sample_note: PDPA effective 2022. Thai-language copy for non-international companies. Bangkok concentration.
thailand.data_quality_note: 88% verification achievable on Bangkok enterprise lists.

argentina.sample_note: GDPR-adequate framework. Spanish-language preferred. Buenos Aires concentration.
argentina.data_quality_note: 89% verification achievable. EU adequacy status simplifies compliance.

spain.sample_note: AEPD enforces GDPR strictly. Spanish-language copy essential. Lunch hours: 2-4pm avoid.
spain.data_quality_note: 91% verification achievable. Madrid and Barcelona concentration.

italy.sample_note: Garante (Italian DPA) strictly enforces. Italian-language copy essential. Relationship context important.
italy.data_quality_note: 91% verification achievable. Milan concentration for B2B.

belgium.sample_note: APD/GBA enforces GDPR. French and Dutch regions require language-matched copy.
belgium.data_quality_note: 93% verification achievable. Brussels and Antwerp concentration.

austria.sample_note: DSB enforces GDPR. German-language copy essential. Vienna concentration.
austria.data_quality_note: 93% verification achievable on Vienna enterprise lists.

portugal.sample_note: CNPD enforces GDPR. Lisbon tech scene growing. Portuguese-language copy preferred.
portugal.data_quality_note: 91% verification achievable. Lisbon and Porto concentration.

czech-republic.sample_note: UOOU enforces GDPR. Strong manufacturing and tech sectors. Prague concentration.
czech-republic.data_quality_note: 92% verification achievable on Prague enterprise lists.

egypt.sample_note: Data Protection Law 2020 — early-stage enforcement. Working week Sun-Thu. Cairo concentration.
egypt.data_quality_note: 87% verification achievable. Emerging enterprise data market.

qatar.sample_note: Working week Sun-Thu. English accepted in international B2B. QFC zone follows GDPR.
qatar.data_quality_note: 91% verification achievable on Doha enterprise lists.

kuwait.sample_note: Oil sector dominant. Working week Sun-Thu. English accepted in B2B.

vietnam.sample_note: Cybersecurity Law applies. Manufacturing hub. Ho Chi Minh City concentration.
vietnam.data_quality_note: 86% verification achievable. Fast-growing enterprise data market.

colombia.sample_note: SIC actively enforces. Express authorization required for processing. Bogota concentration.
colombia.data_quality_note: 88% verification achievable. Must obtain proper consent basis.

chile.sample_note: CPLT oversight. New privacy law pending. Santiago concentration. Copper sector dominant.
chile.data_quality_note: 89% verification achievable on Santiago enterprise lists.

peru.sample_note: LPDP applies. Mining and agriculture sectors dominant. Lima concentration.

greece.sample_note: HDPA enforces GDPR. Tourism, shipping, and professional services dominant. Athens concentration.
greece.data_quality_note: 90% verification achievable on Athens enterprise lists.

romania.sample_note: ANSPDCP enforces GDPR. Growing tech outsourcing hub. Bucharest concentration.
romania.data_quality_note: 91% verification achievable on Bucharest enterprise lists.

hungary.sample_note: NAIH enforces GDPR. Manufacturing and tech sectors growing. Budapest concentration.
hungary.data_quality_note: 91% verification achievable on Budapest enterprise lists.

pakistan.sample_note: PECA 2016 framework. English used in corporate B2B. Karachi and Lahore concentration.
pakistan.data_quality_note: Emerging market. Lower verification rates — target verified enterprise lists.

morocco.sample_note: CNDP framework. French widely used in B2B. Casablanca financial hub.

bangladesh.sample_note: DNCT framework. Garment and manufacturing sectors. Working week often Sun-Thu. Dhaka concentration.
bangladesh.data_quality_note: Emerging market. Lower verification rates achievable — target major enterprise lists.

russia.sample_note: Federal Law 152-FZ applies. Russian-language copy essential. Complex compliance environment.
russia.data_quality_note: Variable quality. Sanctions and compliance considerations apply for international campaigns.

croatia.sample_note: AZOP enforces GDPR. Tourism and manufacturing sectors. Zagreb concentration.
croatia.data_quality_note: 91% verification achievable on Zagreb enterprise lists.

cyprus.sample_note: ODPC enforces GDPR. Financial services hub. English widely used. Nicosia and Limassol.
cyprus.data_quality_note: 92% verification achievable. Small but quality enterprise data market.

estonia.sample_note: AKI enforces GDPR. Highly digital business environment. Tallinn tech hub.
estonia.data_quality_note: 93% verification achievable. Small but digitally sophisticated market.

latvia.sample_note: DVI enforces GDPR. Riga commercial hub. Growing IT and logistics sectors.
latvia.data_quality_note: 92% verification achievable on Riga enterprise lists.

lithuania.sample_note: VDAI enforces GDPR. Vilnius fintech hub. Growing B2B data market.
lithuania.data_quality_note: 92% verification achievable on Vilnius enterprise lists.

luxembourg.sample_note: CNPD enforces GDPR. Major financial hub. Multilingual business environment.
luxembourg.data_quality_note: 94% verification achievable. High-value financial sector concentration.

serbia.sample_note: PPDP law applies. Growing IT outsourcing sector. Belgrade concentration.
serbia.data_quality_note: 90% verification achievable on Belgrade enterprise lists.

ukraine.sample_note: Law on Personal Data Protection. Strong IT sector. Remote work culture increases digital receptivity.
ukraine.data_quality_note: Variable quality due to current circumstances. Target diaspora and remote-first companies.

bahrain.sample_note: PDPL permits B2B processing for LI. Financial hub. Working week Sun-Thu.

oman.sample_note: ITA Cyber Security Framework. Working week Sun-Thu. Oil and logistics sectors dominant.

lebanon.sample_note: Decree 8987 framework. French and Arabic both used in B2B. Beirut professional services.
lebanon.data_quality_note: Variable quality. Target professional services and financial sectors.

ghana.sample_note: Data Protection Act 2012 — minimal enforcement. English dominant. Accra concentration.
ghana.data_quality_note: Emerging market. Target verified enterprise lists for better deliverability.

iceland.sample_note: Personuvernd enforces GDPR. Small market — high personalisation essential. Reykjavik concentration.
iceland.data_quality_note: 93% verification achievable. Very small but quality enterprise data market.

malta.sample_note: IDPC enforces GDPR. Financial services and iGaming hub. English dominant in B2B.
malta.data_quality_note: 92% verification achievable. Small but high-value enterprise market.

slovenia.sample_note: IP RS enforces GDPR. Growing tech sector. Ljubljana concentration.
slovenia.data_quality_note: 91% verification achievable on Ljubljana enterprise lists.

montenegro.sample_note: AZLP enforces GDPR-aligned law. Small market. Tourism and real estate sectors dominant.

sri-lanka.sample_note: PDPB framework emerging. English widely used in B2B. IT and outsourcing sectors. Colombo concentration.
sri-lanka.data_quality_note: Emerging market. 85% verification achievable on enterprise lists.

togo.sample_note: LCEN framework. French dominant in B2B. Lome commercial hub. Emerging data market.
togo.data_quality_note: Emerging market — very limited enterprise data availability. Low verification rates expected.

bulgaria.sample_note: CPDP enforces GDPR. IT outsourcing sector growing. Sofia concentration.
bulgaria.data_quality_note: 90% verification achievable on Sofia enterprise lists.

belarus.sample_note: Law on Personal Data. Complex geopolitical environment. IT sector strong. Minsk concentration.
belarus.data_quality_note: Variable quality. Sanctions and compliance considerations apply for international campaigns.

technology-software.label: Technology & Software
technology-software.open_rate_note: Highest open rates across all B2B verticals. Tech buyers are solution-oriented.
technology-software.reply_rate_note: Tech decision-makers respond well to peer-to-peer technical framing.
technology-software.subject_approach: Specific technical problem + metric or integration reference

healthcare-medical.label: Healthcare & Medical
healthcare-medical.personalization_required: Very High — compliance and patient context essential
healthcare-medical.open_rate_note: Moderate opens. Healthcare buyers are cautious but respond to ROI and compliance framing.
healthcare-medical.reply_rate_note: Compliance-led messaging with ROI data drives replies. Avoid overly salesy tone.
healthcare-medical.subject_approach: Compliance improvement or patient outcome metric

manufacturing-engineering.label: Manufacturing & Engineering
manufacturing-engineering.personalization_required: High — reference specific machinery, process, or sector
manufacturing-engineering.open_rate_note: Steady opens. Manufacturing buyers respond to efficiency and cost reduction framing.
manufacturing-engineering.reply_rate_note: Longer buying cycles. Focus on ROI evidence and operational improvement.

finance-banking.label: Finance & Banking
finance-banking.personalization_required: Very High — regulatory and risk context mandatory
finance-banking.open_rate_note: Conservative open rates. Financial buyers have high spam filters and compliance gatekeepers.
finance-banking.reply_rate_note: Risk reduction and regulatory compliance framing drives replies. Numbers-led messaging.
finance-banking.subject_approach: Regulatory compliance + risk reduction or cost saving

professional-services.label: Professional Services
professional-services.open_rate_note: Above-average opens. Professional services buyers are selective but responsive to peer framing.
professional-services.reply_rate_note: Referral and peer comparison framing drives highest reply rates.
professional-services.subject_approach: Peer firm results or specific practice area improvement

real-estate.label: Real Estate
real-estate.personalization_required: Moderate — market-specific data and local reference
real-estate.open_rate_note: Strong opens especially for local market intelligence. Property buyers are deal-driven.
real-estate.reply_rate_note: Local market data and property-specific offers drive highest reply rates.
real-estate.subject_approach: Local market data point or portfolio improvement metric

construction.label: Construction
construction.personalization_required: Moderate — project type and regional reference helpful
construction.open_rate_note: Early morning send windows outperform. Construction buyers start early.
construction.reply_rate_note: Cost and timeline savings framing drives best results.
construction.subject_approach: Cost reduction or timeline improvement on specific project type

legal.label: Legal
legal.personalization_required: Very High — practice area and jurisdiction specificity essential
legal.open_rate_note: Good opens when highly personalised to practice area. Generic messaging fails.
legal.reply_rate_note: Practice-area specific framing with peer firm references drives replies.
legal.subject_approach: Practice-specific efficiency or regulatory change reference

ecommerce.label: E-commerce
ecommerce.personalization_required: Moderate — platform and traffic context useful
ecommerce.open_rate_note: Highest reply rates of any vertical. E-commerce buyers are fast-moving and ROI-driven.
ecommerce.reply_rate_note: Revenue uplift and conversion rate improvements drive immediate replies.
ecommerce.subject_approach: Revenue per visitor or conversion rate improvement metric

oil-energy.label: Oil & Energy
oil-energy.personalization_required: Very High — technical and regulatory specificity essential
oil-energy.open_rate_note: Conservative opens. Energy buyers have long procurement cycles and technical gatekeepers.
oil-energy.reply_rate_note: Safety, compliance, and operational efficiency framing. Patience required.
oil-energy.subject_approach: HSE compliance improvement or operational efficiency metric

education-training.label: Education & Training
education-training.personalization_required: Moderate — institution type and learning outcome focus
education-training.open_rate_note: Good open rates. Education buyers respond to outcome and accreditation framing.
education-training.reply_rate_note: Student outcome and accreditation improvement drives replies.
education-training.subject_approach: Student outcome metric or accreditation improvement

retail-commerce.label: Retail & Commerce
retail-commerce.personalization_required: Moderate — product category and channel context helpful
retail-commerce.open_rate_note: Moderate opens. Retail buyers are price-sensitive and ROI-focused.
retail-commerce.reply_rate_note: Sales uplift and margin improvement messaging performs best.
retail-commerce.subject_approach: Category revenue uplift or margin improvement

agriculture-food.label: Agriculture & Food
agriculture-food.personalization_required: Moderate — crop type, processing stage, or geographic region
agriculture-food.open_rate_note: Seasonal variation significant. Early morning sends outperform. Practical, direct copy wins.
agriculture-food.reply_rate_note: Yield improvement, cost reduction, and weather/logistics framing drives replies.
agriculture-food.subject_approach: Yield improvement or cost reduction specific to crop/product type

transportation-logistics.label: Transportation & Logistics
transportation-logistics.personalization_required: Moderate — mode of transport and route/region reference
transportation-logistics.open_rate_note: Logistics buyers respond to real-time solutions. Speed and cost framing works.
transportation-logistics.reply_rate_note: On-time delivery improvement and fuel/cost reduction drives strong replies.
transportation-logistics.subject_approach: On-time delivery rate improvement or cost-per-shipment reduction

c_suite.label: C-Suite (CEO, CFO, CTO, CMO, COO)
c_suite.personalization_required: Maximum — must reference specific business outcome
c_suite.copy_length: Ultra-short (under 80 words). No pitch, one specific question.
c_suite.volume_recommendation: Under 500 per sequence. Quality over quantity.
c_suite.note: C-suite reply rates are low but conversion rates when replies happen are extremely high. One C-suite reply often converts to a six-figure deal.

vp_director.label: VP / Director Level
vp_director.volume_recommendation: 500-2,000 per sequence. Good balance of volume and quality.
vp_director.note: VP and Director level is the sweet spot for most B2B campaigns. High enough to make decisions, approachable enough to reply.

manager.label: Manager / Senior Manager
manager.personalization_required: Moderate — function and tool reference sufficient
manager.best_subject_approach: Specific tool or workflow problem they face
manager.note: Managers have the highest open and reply rates but may not have final budget authority. Best for top-of-funnel and qualification.

owner_founder.label: Owner / Founder (SMB)
owner_founder.best_subject_approach: Revenue growth or time-saving specific to their business type
owner_founder.volume_recommendation: 1,000-5,000 per sequence. Segment by industry for best results.
owner_founder.note: SMB owners have the highest reply rates and shortest decision cycles. They can say yes immediately. Best for offers with clear, fast ROI.

purchased_verified.label: Purchased — Verified B2B List
purchased_verified.note: Best balance of scale and quality. Verified lists from reputable providers achieve near-inbound deliverability when combined with domain warm-up and list cleaning.

scraped_unverified.label: Scraped — Unverified List
scraped_unverified.note: Unverified scraped lists cause severe sender reputation damage. Hard bounce rates of 8-22% will trigger ESP account suspension. Domain blacklisting risk is high. Not recommended for any professional outreach.

opted_in.label: Opted-In / Consent-Based List
opted_in.note: Opted-in lists achieve the highest performance metrics across all dimensions. The challenge is scale — opt-in lists are typically 10-50x smaller than purchased lists. Used for nurture sequences, newsletter campaigns, and re-engagement.

composite_scenarios.label: USA · Technology · C-Suite · Verified List
composite_scenarios.note: Best combined scenario for high-value enterprise deals. Send Tue-Thu 7:30-9am. Personalise to CTO/VP Eng stack.

composite_scenarios.label: UK · Finance & Banking · VP/Director · Verified List
composite_scenarios.note: PECR compliance essential. FCA-regulated angle. In-persona personalisation to specific regulatory challenge.

composite_scenarios.label: USA · E-commerce · Owner/Founder · Verified List
composite_scenarios.note: Highest reply rate scenario. Revenue-first messaging. Shopify/WooCommerce stack reference. Sub-80 word copy.

composite_scenarios.label: India · Technology · Manager · Verified List
composite_scenarios.note: High volume, high receptivity. English copy. Technical specificity valued. Bangalore/Mumbai focus.

composite_scenarios.label: Germany · Manufacturing · VP/Director · Verified List
composite_scenarios.note: German-language copy essential. ROI-heavy, technical messaging. Compliance preamble required.

composite_scenarios.label: UAE · Professional Services · VP/Director · Verified List
composite_scenarios.note: Mon-Thu sending window. Relationship-context opening. English accepted. Ramadan calendar awareness.
